pipedrive.name: Pipedrive
pipedrive.tagline: Sales CRM and pipeline management software that helps sales teams visualize their sales process and close more deals
pipedrive.description: Pipedrive is a sales-focused CRM platform designed to help sales teams visualize and optimize their sales pipeline. With its intuitive deal tracking interface, activity-based reminders, and customizable sales stages, Pipedrive makes it easy for salespeople to focus on actions that move deals forward. The platform serves over 100,000 companies worldwide.
pros: Visual sales pipeline with drag-and-drop deal management across customizable stages that maps precisely to any sales methodology, reducing pipeline admin time by an average of 5 hours per week per sales rep
Activity-based reminders and scheduling engine automatically suggests next actions based on deal stage, ensuring no follow-ups slip through the cracks in high-volume sales environments
Email sync with Gmail and Outlook automatically logs all sales correspondence to the relevant deal record, eliminating manual data entry for 90% of routine sales communication
Customizable sales reporting dashboard with real-time revenue forecasts, activity tracking, and conversion analytics that provide clear visibility into team performance and pipeline health
LeadBooster add-on tools including web visitor tracking, live chat, and prospector data enrichment that feed high-quality leads directly into the pipeline without manual prospecting work
cons: Advanced marketing automation features like email sequences and lead scoring require the separate LeadBooster add-on at $30-50/month extra, making full-featured sales and marketing stacks more expensive than all-in-one alternatives like HubSpot

Enterprise features including advanced permissions, custom reporting, and dedicated support require the Enterprise plan at $99/user/month, which is significantly more expensive than comparable tiers from Salesforce or Zoho for large teams
Native integration library at 300+ apps is smaller than HubSpot's 1,500+ or Salesforce's 3,000+, potentially requiring custom API development for connecting niche or industry-specific tools

features.name: Sales Pipeline
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop pipeline management with customizable stages for any sales methodology

features.name: Deal Management
features.description: Track deals with custom fields, values, probabilities, and expected close dates across the full sales cycle

features.name: Activity Scheduling
features.description: Automatic next-activity suggestions based on deal stage with calendar integration and reminder notifications

features.name: Email Sync
features.description: Bidirectional email sync with Gmail and Outlook, auto-linking messages to contacts and deals

features.name: Contact Management
features.description: Rich contact profiles with communication history, custom fields, and organizational hierarchy

features.name: Goals & Reports
features.description: Custom sales reports with revenue forecasting, activity tracking, and real-time dashboard views

features.name: Revenue Forecasting
features.description: AI-powered revenue predictions based on pipeline velocity and historical conversion rates

features.name: Sales Reports
features.description: Pre-built and custom report templates for team performance, pipeline health, and conversion metrics

features.name: Web Visitors
features.description: Track website visitors and identify which companies are browsing, with lead enrichment data

features.name: LeadBooster
features.description: Add-on lead generation toolkit including live chat, chatbots, web forms, and prospector tools

features.name: Google Workspace Sync
features.description: Deep integration with Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Drive, and Google Contacts

features.name: Microsoft 365 Sync
features.description: Native integration with Outlook email and calendar, Microsoft Teams, and SharePoint

features.name: API & Webhooks
features.description: RESTful API and webhook support for building custom integrations and automation workflows

features.name: Zapier Integration
features.description: Connect to 5,000+ apps through native Zapier integration for no-code workflow automation

features.name: Mobile CRM
features.description: Full-featured iOS and Android apps with deal management, activity tracking, and push notifications

features.name: Sales Inbox
features.description: Unified email inbox within Pipedrive that syncs conversations across accounts and links to deals

features.name: Smart Docs
features.description: Document creation and tracking with send, open, and download notifications for proposals and quotes

features.name: Permission Sets
features.description: Granular user permissions controlling deal, pipeline, report, and feature access by role and team
